display-face.$value: large crisp high-contrast Claude masthead with aerospace campaign restraint

utility-face.$value: compact aerospace stencil sans or precise technical grotesk for short labels, bilingual text clear and sparse

flag-editorial.$value: premium public-benefit AI campaign poster, one modern woven fabric flag as the hero object, clear editorial hierarchy, tactile paper and desk-light realism, quiet confidence, spacious composition

thinking-space.$value: visual cues of serious thinking: paper margins, soft gridlines, pencil notes, simple reasoning diagrams, controlled negative space, no generic glowing AI sphere

hardware-frontier.$value: premium cinematic aerospace hardware campaign poster, physical technology drives the image, believable moon mission equipment, frontier-scale engineering, no decorative interface layer

lunar-machinery.$value: dominant real objects: tall lunar landing rocket or ascent vehicle, compact lander with folded legs, thruster bells, rover, solar-panel wings, antenna mast, mechanical arm, instrument packages, cable umbilicals, truss structures, dust-covered brushed titanium, ceramic white shells, graphite thermal blankets, blue-white engine or sensor light

global-exclude.$value: garbled text, unreadable typography, malformed Claude word, fake official seals, fake sponsor logos, watermark, cheap e-commerce flyer, cartoon astronaut, glossy robot mascot, generic glowing AI sphere, plastic UI panels, HUD overlays, floating dashboard widgets, holographic interface screens, cyberpunk neon city, cozy paper notebook, hand-drawn desk sketch, warm scrapbook editorial, crowded composition

campaign.name: claude-moon-landing
campaign.brief: 为 Anthropic 的 Claude 制作一张中文竖版宣发图，传达 Claude 帮助用户抵达更难的问题边界，带有登月式胜利感；这是非官方 campaign concept，不要伪装成官方公告。

content.headline: Claude
content.subject: 月球表面上，一面写有 Claude 的现代织物旗帜立在月壤中；旗帜周围是实体航天硬件：一枚高耸的月面着陆火箭或上升级、带折叠支腿的登月器、推进器喷口、月面探测车、太阳能板翼、天线桅杆、机械臂、仪器箱、线缆接口和金属桁架。远处能看到地球弧光，整体表达把复杂问题推进到新的边界。画面可以加入清晰小字："抵达更难的问题" 和 "For problem solvers reaching further"。

positioning.audience: builders, analysts, researchers, operators, and teams solving complex work
notes: Claude is positioned around thinking, problem solving, and reliable collaboration.

elements.description: AI research and products that foreground safety, usefulness, and long-term benefit.
Claude as a tool for deep work, structured thinking, and complex problem solving.

accepted.description: Claude should feel useful for people working through difficult, high-context problems.
The campaign should feel calm, clear, and intentionally uncluttered.

positioning.promise: A thinking partner for people solving complex work.
positioning.usage_note: Unofficial campaign concept; do not imply a formal Anthropic announcement.

elements.description: A single textile flag used as a memorable launch symbol for thought and direction.
Paper, notes, diagrams, and desk-light details that imply serious thinking.

accepted.description: Avoid fake certification marks, fake press badges, or misleading official notices.
The Claude word should be large, simple, and readable.

resolved_style.name: flag-launch
resolved_style.prompt: premium cinematic aerospace hardware campaign poster, physical technology drives the image, believable moon mission equipment, frontier-scale engineering, no decorative interface layer, dominant real objects: tall lunar landing rocket or ascent vehicle, compact lander with folded legs, thruster bells, rover, solar-panel wings, antenna mast, mechanical arm, instrument packages, cable umbilicals, truss structures, dust-covered brushed titanium, ceramic white shells, graphite thermal blankets, blue-white engine or sensor light
resolved_style.typography: large crisp high-contrast Claude masthead with aerospace campaign restraint; compact aerospace stencil sans or precise technical grotesk for short labels, bilingual text clear and sparse
resolved_style.negative: garbled text, unreadable typography, malformed Claude word, fake official seals, fake sponsor logos, watermark, cheap e-commerce flyer, cartoon astronaut, glossy robot mascot, generic glowing AI sphere, plastic UI panels, HUD overlays, floating dashboard widgets, holographic interface screens, cyberpunk neon city, cozy paper notebook, hand-drawn desk sketch, warm scrapbook editorial, crowded composition

Subject: 月球表面上，一面写有 Claude 的现代织物旗帜立在月壤中；旗帜周围是实体航天硬件：一枚高耸的月面着陆火箭或上升级、带折叠支腿的登月器、推进器喷口、月面探测车、太阳能板翼、天线桅杆、机械臂、仪器箱、线缆接口和金属桁架。远处能看到地球弧光，整体表达把复杂问题推进到新的边界。画面可以加入清晰小字："抵达更难的问题" 和 "For problem solvers reaching further"。
Deliverable: moon-poster, 1024x1536px
Headline text to render exactly: "Claude"
Use only this brand palette unless natural lighting requires subtle neutrals: #05070B, #E7E2D8, #A9B0B6, #D87857, #56B8FF, #2A2D31
Typography direction for visible text: large crisp high-contrast Claude masthead with aerospace campaign restraint; compact aerospace stencil sans or precise technical grotesk for short labels, bilingual text clear and sparse
Keep the locked brand style constant; vary only the campaign content and composition for this deliverable.
